creator: mauricio@arareko.net
text:
Patch is breaking here:

[root@freebsd-vm] /usr/ports/biology/py-biopython # make install
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for py25-biopython-1.50
=> MD5 Checksum OK for biopython-1.50.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for biopython-1.50.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for py25-biopython-1.50
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for py25-biopython-1.50
2 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to setup.py.rej
=> Patch patch-setup.py failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/biology/py-biopython.

I'm attaching work/biopython-1.50/setup.py.rej file. Please make the necessary corrections and resend a new patch.

Thanks,
Mauricio.




----- Original Message ----
From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
To: mauricio@arareko.net
Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Sent: Thursday, April 23, 2009 9:40:13 AM
Subject: Re: ports/133951: [Update]biology/py-biopython:update to 1.50

Maintainer of biology/py-biopython,

Please note that PR ports/133951 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133951

-- 
Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
edwin@FreeBSD.org
